V0612_01_00_06_0.text: Let's set this Duel on fire, Playmaker!

V0612_01_00_09_0.text: Don't even think about letting me win, Varis!

V0612_01_00_11_0.text:
Beware!
Soulburner does not know the meaning of mercy!

V0612_01_00_12_0.text: Flame, you in the mood to Duel?

V0612_01_00_12_1.text:
I am.
Let's bring the heat, Soulburner!

V0612_01_00_13_0.text: What do you think they're gonna do, Flame?

V0612_01_00_13_1.text:
I do not know.
But what I do know is we must be careful.

V0612_01_00_14_0.text:
Ready, Flame?
It's not often we Duel an opponent this tough!

V0612_01_00_14_1.text: Yes - so I do hope you give your maximum effort to win.

V0612_01_00_15_0.text:
We get to Duel against Gore? Hooray!
This is called sarcasm.

V0612_01_00_15_1.text: I know what sarcasm is, Flame.

V0612_01_00_16_0.text: She uses combos that slowly whittle her opponent’s LP.

V0612_01_00_16_1.text:
I heard.  
We can't let her do that to us if we want to win!

V0612_01_00_17_0.text:
Watch out, Soulburner!
He'll use every trick in the book!

V0612_01_00_17_1.text: You don't have to tell me twice!

V0612_01_00_18_0.text: I cannot change the past - no matter how much I want to.

V0612_01_00_18_1.text: But we can change the future by defeating you!

V0612_01_00_19_0.text: I'm not one for speeches, but you're going down!

V0612_01_00_19_1.text:
You're right.
You're not one for speeches - but I do agree.

V0612_03_00_06_1.text:
You know it!
It's my turn!

V0612_03_00_09_0.text: Instead of chasing the win, let the victory come to you.

V0612_03_00_09_1.text:
Aww c'mon!
This is the perfect time to push!
It's my turn!

V0612_03_00_07_0.text: This is turning out to be a fun Duel.

V0612_03_00_10_0.text: Slow your mind so you don't accidentally make a mistake.

V0612_03_00_08_0.text:
Get up, Soulburner!
I know your flame still burns!

V0612_03_00_08_1.text:
You're not wrong about that, Flame!
It's my turn!

V0612_03_00_11_0.text: You're not going down without a fight, are you?

V0612_03_00_11_1.text:
I never have, and I never will!
It's my turn!

V0612_05_00_01_0.text:
Our fate rests on this draw.
Let's face our future together!

V0612_05_00_01_1.text: My heart's on fire! Burning Draw!

V0612_06_01_04_0.text: Show 'em what you can do, Soulburner!

V0612_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over my Set card!

V0612_07_09_01_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0612_10_00_04_0.text: The time has come to Summon exactly what we need!

V0612_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon my monster in Defense Position!

V0612_11_10_01_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_11_10_02_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_11_10_02_1.text:
I set my monsters in the Link Arrows!
Link the circuit!

V0612_21_00_09_0.text:
Of course you're winning.
You have me to help you after all.

V0612_21_00_09_1.text:
I'm doing stuff too, you know.
I end my turn!

V0612_21_00_07_0.text: I wonder what our opponent will do...

V0612_21_00_07_1.text:
We'll find out soon enough.
I end my turn!

V0612_21_00_10_0.text:
You're Dueling well.
Seems you don't need my advice at all.

V0612_21_00_10_1.text:
I know you'll pipe in if I need you.
I end my turn!

V0612_21_00_08_1.text:
Yeah. I'm good.
I end my turn!

V0612_21_00_11_0.text:
Hang in there!
You'll get a chance to turn this Duel around!

V0612_21_00_11_1.text:
Don't worry!
They just caught me off guard!
I end my turn!

V0612_28_00_04_0.text:
I did it...
I actually did it...
I defeated Playmaker!

V0612_28_00_05_0.text:
You're my hero, Gore.
But I couldn't let you stop me!

V0612_28_00_06_0.text:
Did you change your avatar?
This one's awesome!

V0612_28_00_06_1.text: Maybe I should change my avatar too.

V0612_28_00_07_0.text: You created this mess, so make sure it never happens again.

V0612_28_00_07_1.text: I order you to stop anyone who stirs up trouble.

V0612_28_00_09_0.text:
My name is Flame.
F-L-A-M-E.
The "F" stands for "fabulous!"

V0612_28_00_09_1.text: You sound like you did all the Dueling instead of me...

V0612_28_00_10_0.text: Despite the mistakes you made - well done, Soulburner.

V0612_28_00_12_0.text: Isn't it wonderful to have such a smart AI as your ally?

V0612_28_00_12_1.text: I think it's greater that this ally is an awesome friend!

V0612_28_00_13_1.text: Your heart was burning as bright as the sun.

V0612_28_00_14_0.text:
Your new avatar is awesome too!
Maybe I should change mine.

V0612_28_00_14_1.text: Why change your look when you're not as popular as her?

V0612_28_00_15_0.text: Flame helped me defeat my fears and overcome my past.

V0612_28_00_15_1.text: It's the least I could do for my best friend.

V0612_28_00_16_0.text: The wind can blow out a flame, but it can fan it too.

V0612_28_00_17_0.text: Soulburner and I are proof that 1+1 can equal more than 2.

V0612_28_00_19_0.text:
My name is Flame.
F-L-A-M-E.
The "F" stands for "ferocious!"

V0612_29_00_03_0.text: That's why you're the best, Playmaker!

V0612_29_00_04_0.text: I may've lost, but it was amazing that I got to Duel you!

V0612_29_00_05_0.text: I see why you're the most popular celebrity in LINK VRAINS!

V0612_29_00_06_0.text: You're not a great person, but you are a great Duelist.

V0612_29_00_08_0.text: I think it would be wise to make fewer mistakes next time.

V0612_29_00_08_1.text: It's not like I was trying to mess up, Flame...

V0612_29_00_09_0.text: That was not a good showing, Soulburner.

V0612_29_00_09_1.text:
Don't remind me!
I know that more than anyone!

V0612_29_00_10_0.text: Luck wasn't on my side today.

V0612_29_00_10_1.text: We must work harder so we won't have to rely on luck.

V0612_29_00_11_1.text: When you lost your cool, that's when you lost the Duel.

V0612_33_00_01_0.text: If you're gonna stand in my way, you're gonna get burnt!

V0612_33_00_02_0.text: Flame and I are bringin' the heat!

V0612_33_00_05_0.text: It's time to bring the heat, Soulburner!

V0612_33_00_05_1.text:
Ready to witness a miracle?
Burning Draw!

V0612_33_00_06_1.text:
I'll set the world aflame!
Burning Draw!

V0612_34_00_07_0.text: What am I supposed to say to everyone who got me this far?

V0612_34_00_11_0.text:
My name is Flame.
F-L-A-M-E.
The "F" stands for "fantastic!"

V0612_34_00_11_1.text: I know. You've already told me like a billion times.

V0612_34_00_11_2.text: It's actually 37 times, but who's counting. Except for me.

V0612_34_00_12_0.text:
Ahh... Ahhhhh!
Stop it!
I can't take it anymore!

V0612_34_00_12_1.text:
Calm down, Soulburner!
Don't let your fears overwhelm you!

V0612_34_00_13_0.text: Our opponent knows exactly how to counter our Deck.

V0612_34_00_13_1.text: I didn't know we were so famous.

V0612_34_00_14_1.text: Unless... What if we approach this from a different angle?

V0612_34_00_15_0.text: I'd say you're acting childish, but I won't insult a child.

V0612_34_00_16_0.text: If you want to change your fate, you must face it head-on!

V0612_34_00_17_0.text:
Confront your pain!
Let your spirit reincarnate!

V0612_34_00_18_0.text: Instead of giving me their two cents, they gave me a dollar.

V0612_32_00_00_0.text:
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!
Link into the VRAINS!

V0612_35_00_02_0.text:
The name's Soulburner.
I am the Fire Ignis.
You may call me Flame.

V0612_35_00_03_0.text:
Soulburner doesn't seem like much, but he is very talented.
Thanks, I guess…

V0612_36_00_02_0.text: Sorry... I know you can turn this around!

V0612_36_00_05_0.text: Maybe you have an answer, Playmaker!

V0612_36_00_06_0.text:
Playmaker! Ai!
It's all up to you!

V0612_36_00_07_0.text:
Aqua!
Show 'em just how powerful you are!

V0612_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Cybersal Cyclone!

V0612_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusion of Fire!

V0612_08_00_02_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fury of Fire!

V0612_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Rising Fire!

V0612_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Burning Draw!

V0612_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Monster Reincarnation!

V0612_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Will of the Salamangreat!

V0612_08_00_08_0.text: Will of the Salamangreat's effect activates!

V0612_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Salamangreat Burning Shell!

V0612_08_00_10_0.text: I activate Salamangreat Burning Shell from my Graveyard!

V0612_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Salamangreat Circle!

V0612_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Ritual Spell!
Rise of the Salamangreat!

V0612_08_00_13_0.text: Rise of the Salamangreat activates when it's destroyed!

V0612_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Salamangreat Sanctuary!

V0612_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Salamangreat Transcendence!

V0612_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Salamangreat Claw!

V0612_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Salamangreat Recureance!

V0612_08_00_19_0.text: Salamangreat Recureance activates when it's destroyed!

V0612_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Counter Trap!
Salamangreat Roar!

V0612_08_00_21_0.text: Salamangreat Roar's effect activates from the Graveyard!

V0612_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Salamangreat Rage!

V0612_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Salamangreat Gift!

V0612_09_00_00_0.text: Heatleo's effect activates when it's Link Summoned!

V0612_09_00_01_0.text: By Reincarnation Link Summoning Heatleo, it can do this!

V0612_09_00_03_0.text: Check out Sunlight Wolf's reincarnation effect!

V0612_09_00_04_0.text: Pyro Phoenix has an effect when it's Reincarnated!

V0612_09_00_04_1.text: It destroys all cards on your field!

V0612_09_00_08_0.text: Emerald Eagle can use its effect when it's Reincarnated!

V0612_09_00_08_1.text: It destroys every Special Summoned monster on your field!

V0612_09_00_11_0.text: Blaze Dragon can use its effect when it's Reincarnated!

V0612_09_00_11_1.text: It destroys one monster on your field!

V0612_09_00_32_0.text: I activate Decode Talker Heatsoul's effect!

V0612_37_00_00_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_46_00_00_0.text: The swirling flames awaken Heatleo's true strength!

V0612_47_00_00_0.text: Rise again from the valley of flames!

V0612_46_00_01_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_47_00_01_0.text:
Be reborn!
Link 2 Salamangreat Sunlight Wolf!

V0612_46_00_02_0.text:
Let the flames engulf your body!
From its ashes, be reborn!

V0612_46_00_03_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_46_00_04_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_47_00_04_0.text:
You're your whole new self!
Link 1 Salamangreat Almiraj!

V0612_37_00_06_0.text: The scorching dragon that incinerates the sky!

V0612_47_00_06_0.text: Be reborn, Rank 4 Salamangreat Blaze Dragon!

V0612_37_00_07_0.text: This wild steed blazes the tundra to torch every illusion!

V0612_37_00_08_0.text: When the flames consume the old, a new creature emerges!

V0612_26_00_02_0.text: I'll get you back for that!

V0612_26_00_03_0.text: You need to be more careful, Soulburner.

V0612_26_00_04_0.text: You're not just going to take that, are you?

V0612_27_00_03_0.text: The Soulburner I know will keep fighting!

V0612_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Salamangreat Charge!

V0612_08_00_26_0.text: I activate the Trap, Salamangreat Revive!

V0612_08_00_27_0.text: I banish Salamangreat Revive from the Graveyard!

V0612_08_00_28_0.text: I activate Phoenix Gearblade and equip it on my monster!

V0612_09_00_33_0.text: Raging Phoenix's effect activates when it reincarnates!

V0612_09_00_34_0.text: Raging Phoenix activates its effect from the Graveyard!

V0612_09_00_36_0.text: Burst Gryphon's effect activates when it reincarnates!

V0612_09_00_37_0.text: I activate Salamangreat Tiger's effect from my hand!

V0612_09_00_39_0.text: Salamangreat Weasel's effect activates from my hand!

V0612_09_00_40_0.text: Salamangreat Weasel activates its effect from my Graveyard!

V0612_09_00_41_0.text: Code of Soul activates its effect from my hand!

V0612_09_00_42_0.text: I activate Code of Soul's effect!

V0612_09_00_43_0.text: I banish Code of Soul from the Graveyard to use its effect!

V0612_09_00_44_0.text: Summoning Salamangreat of Fire activates its effect!

V0612_09_00_45_0.text: I banish Salamangreat of Fire from my Graveyard!

V0612_09_00_46_0.text: I activate Immortal Phoenix Gearfried's effect from my hand!

V0612_09_00_47_0.text: Immortal Phoenix Gearfried activates its effect!

V0612_09_00_48_0.text: I remove an Equip Card to activate my Gearfried's effect!

V0612_37_00_09_0.text: I blaze the circuit that scorches the path to the future!

V0612_46_00_09_0.text: Let the flames engulf you as your soul rises from its ashes!

V0612_47_00_09_0.text:
Be reborn!
Link 4 Salamangreat Raging Phoenix!

V0612_47_00_10_0.text: Reborn as the soaring predator with cerulean wings!

V0612_13_00_34_0.text:
Blaze to the field!
Level 9 Immortal Phoenix Gearfried!
